name: I had back issues before, machine accident at work made it worse—still get comp?
description: Yes, aggravation of pre-existing conditions is compensable.

mainEntity.name: I had back issues before, machine accident at work made it worse—still get comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, aggravation of pre-existing conditions is compensable.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, Utah law covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions from work accidents.** No disqualification if employment caused the flare-up[1]. Prove causal link via medical opinion. Common in machinery strain cases. Report fully. Attorney fights denials.
